raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schts irr Dauna Behrnu
Zilts Jhpaſchums/ pehz winno
Saimehn/ tchee Pilſtahti/ un
winzu Zeemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tee uu bij pabeigu-
fchi to Semini par Jhpaſchumu
iſdalliht/ pehz fatwahn Rohbe-
schahm/ tad dewe Ifraēka Behr-
ni Josuiun Nunna Dehlam wee-
nu eemantojamu Teefu winno
Widdii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz ta KUNGA Wahr-
du derwe tee winnam to Pilſtab-
tu/ ko wiꞥſch praſſija Tinnat-
Seru */ us Gewraima Kalneem/
un wiꞥſch uſtaifija to Pilſfah-
tu/ un dſihwoja eeſch ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* Scheitan irr Josuiis aprakts : Jos. 24, 30.
Ta irr ta Jhpaſchuma
Teefa/ koGeleasars tas Preesteris/
un Josuiis Nunna Dehts/ un tee
augſtakee Ziltu Tehvi/ teem If-
raēta Behrneem zaar Meſloſcha-
nu iſdallija eeſch Sihlus/ preekſeb
ta KUNGA/ preekſch tahs Sa-
eeschanas Telts Durwin/ un tee
beitſe to Semini iſdalliht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
Josuiis paweht/ lai Ifraēia Behrni fech Gelbe-
schanas Pilſjahtus eezett preekſch teem/ kas
netihſchi fahdu Zilweku nofanj : 2/7/9.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "U n tas KUNGS run-
naja us Josuii/ un taz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Runna us Ifraēta Behr-
neem/ un fakti: Leckait preekſch
iuns tohs Gelbeſchunas Pilṣ-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fachtus/ no ka es ar jums efm-
runnajs zaar Mohsu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka us turren behgt wa-
tas Nokawejs/ kas kahdu Dwe-
feli nonejauscht nesinnadam
kauj/ ka tee jums par Patweri-
nu warr buht no ta Afias-A-
reebeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kursch us kahdu no ſcheei-
Pilſfahteem behg/ tam buhs pe-
Pilſfahta + Wahrtu Durwi-
stahweht/ uu fawus Wahrdu-
preekſch ta Pilſfahta Wezzaj-
Aufim runnaht/ tad buhs tee-
winzu pee fawmi Pilſfahta xen-
un winnam Weetu doht /
wiꞥſch pee teem dſihwoht warra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas Afias-Atre-
bejs winnam pakkatdſennahs-
tad teem ne buhs to Nokawe-
winnam Rohkā doht/ tapehz-
wiꞥſch fawu Tuwaku nesinn-
dams kanis irr/ un ne irr win-
pirmak eenihdejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tam tai Pil-
fahta dſihwoht/ teekans wiſ-
preekſch Teefas stahw/ preekſ-
tahs Drandses / kamchrt ta-
Angsts-Preesteris mirſt/. kasta-
nis Deenas buhs/ tad buhs ta-
Nokawejam atgreestees/ un faw-
Pilſfahta/ un fawa Nammi-
nahkt/ us to Pilſfahtu/ no ku-
renes wiꞥſch irr isbehdsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad eefwehtija tee Kede-
eekſch Galileas/ us trem Nam-
tata Kalneem/ un Sikemu u-
Eewraimn Kalneem/ un Kiria-
Arbu/fchis irr Eekrons/ us tec-
Juha Kalneem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
